description: A fixed utility navigation bar containing a home link and site search form, displayed at the top of every page on the Sheffield university website.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Standard MUSE bar with home link and site search, matching all observed pages.

notes: This component appears on all 26276 indexed pages with identical DOM structure — no structural variation was observed across any sample. The nav.muse contains only a single home icon link (href='/') using Font Awesome icons (fas fa-home). The muse-bar has an additional class 'smooth-criminal' that appears consistently on all pages — it is hardcoded, not a prop. The site-search includes a hidden input with name 'f.Tabs|AllDocumentsFill' and value 'All results' — hardcode in JSX. All aria-labels are static and should be hardcoded. The search form label text 'Search sheffield.ac.uk' and placeholder 'Search our site' are also identical across all pages — hardcode in JSX. Low structural variation (duplicates: 14 out of 15 samples, textVaries: false) confirms this is a fixed global utility bar.
